products.name: Redragon K552 Kumara TKL
products.description: Compact tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Outemu Blue switches. Metal plate construction, red LED backlight, anti-ghosting. Perfect for gaming and daily typing.

products.name: Logitech G102 Lightsync
products.description: 8000 DPI adjustable optical sensor. 6 programmable buttons with onboard memory. 16.8M color RGB LIGHTSYNC. Ambidextrous design, ultra-light 85g.

products.name: Fantech HG20 RGB Headset
products.description: 7.1 virtual surround sound gaming headset. Omnidirectional noise-canceling microphone. Memory foam ear cushions. Dual USB + 3.5mm mode. RGB LED ring.

products.name: Havit HV-KB395L Low Profile
products.description: Ultra-slim low-profile mechanical switches with 2mm actuation. Full-size 104-key layout. Per-key RGB with 20 lighting effects. Quiet for office and gaming.

products.name: A4Tech Bloody A70 Neon
products.description: Blazing Light Strike optical switch at 0.2ms. 4000 DPI adjustable. 7 programmable buttons. Ergonomic right-hand design with non-slip rubber grip. Braided cable.

products.name: Rapoo VH510 7.1 Headset
products.description: Professional 7.1 virtual surround. Retractable noise-canceling mic. Plush protein leather ear cups. USB powered with inline volume control.

products.name: SteelSeries QcK Plus Mousepad
products.description: 450x400mm premium micro-woven cloth for consistent low-friction glide. Non-slip rubber base. Anti-fray stitched edges. All sensor compatible.

products.name: Philips 24E1N1300A Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch Full HD IPS panel. 100Hz refresh rate. 4ms response time. HDMI + VGA. Eye comfort certified — flicker-free and low blue mode. Ultra-slim 7mm bezel.

products.name: Anker 7-Port USB 3.0 Hub
products.description: 7 SuperSpeed USB 3.0 ports at 5Gbps. Individual LED indicators. Compact aluminum housing. Bus-powered. Win/Mac/Linux compatible.

products.name: Redragon M711 Cobra RGB
products.description: 10000 DPI with 7-weight tuning. 7 programmable buttons. 16.8M RGB across 7 zones. Braided cable. 5 programmable profiles.

products.name: Aukey KM-G9 Full-Size RGB
products.description: Full-size 104-key with Blue switches. Floating keycap design with per-key RGB. Anti-ghosting N-key rollover. Detachable palm rest. USB passthrough.

products.name: Havit RGB XL Desk Mousepad
products.description: Extended 900x400mm surface. USB RGB LED with 14 lighting modes. Micro-woven cloth. Non-slip rubber base.

products.name: TP-Link UE300 USB Ethernet
products.description: USB 3.0 to Gigabit Ethernet at 1000Mbps. Plug-and-play on Win/Mac/Linux. Foldable compact design for travel.

products.name: Logitech G435 Wireless Headset
products.description: Bluetooth 5.1 + LIGHTSPEED 2.4GHz. 18-hour battery. Only 165g. Built-in dual beamforming mics. Eco-friendly recycled plastic build.

products.name: Baseus 100W Charging Station
products.description: 6-in-1 charging hub. 2x USB-C 100W PD + 4x USB-A fast charge. Surge protection. LED indicator. Compact tower design.
